message.content:
{
  "page_type": "equipment_structure",
  "summary": "This is the cover page of a YORK YEWS water-cooled screw chiller installation, operation, and maintenance manual. It features a photograph of the chiller unit, model range YEWS100-YEWS200, and a safety warning about pressurized refrigerant.",
  "visual_entities": [
    {"type": "logo", "label": "YORK logo"},
    {"type": "text_block", "label": "Manual title and model information"},
    {"type": "equipment_image", "label": "YEWS water-cooled screw chiller unit"},
    {"type": "control_panel", "label": "Chiller control panel with display"},
    {"type": "compressor", "label": "Screw compressor assembly"},
    {"type": "vessel", "label": "Evaporator/condenser shell"},
    {"type": "piping", "label": "Refrigerant and water piping"},
    {"type": "warning_box", "label": "Safety warning about pressurized refrigerant"}
  ],
  "visual_relationships": [
    {"from": "YORK logo", "relation": "is part of", "to": "Manual title and model information"},
    {"from": "control_panel", "relation": "is mounted on", "to": "equipment_image"},
    {"from": "compressor", "relation": "is connected to", "to": "vessel"},
    {"from": "piping", "relation": "connects", "to": "compressor"},
    {"from": "piping", "relation": "connects", "to": "vessel"}
  ],
  "useful_for_knowledge_types": ["equipment_identification", "safety_procedures", "manual_navigation"],
  "ocr_text_if_useful": "YORK YEWS水冷螺杆式冷水机组\n安装、操作和维护手册\n替代:0704\nSC-E08.10M-WX (0405)\nYEWS100 ~ YEWS200\n警告\n系统内充注了一定压力的制冷剂\n对系统进行维护时，如果操作程序不正确，可能严重损伤系统，所有维护工作必须由约克维修技术人员按照约克的安装，操作维护手册来进行。",
  "uncertainty_notes": "The specific functions of the visible piping and vessel components cannot be determined from this image alone. The exact model within the YEWS100-YEWS200 range is not specified.",
  "confidence": 0.95
}

parsed.summary: This is the cover page of a YORK YEWS water-cooled screw chiller installation, operation, and maintenance manual. It features a photograph of the chiller unit, model range YEWS100-YEWS200, and a safety warning about pressurized refrigerant.
parsed.ocr_text_if_useful:
YORK YEWS水冷螺杆式冷水机组
安装、操作和维护手册
替代:0704
SC-E08.10M-WX (0405)
YEWS100 ~ YEWS200
警告
系统内充注了一定压力的制冷剂
对系统进行维护时，如果操作程序不正确，可能严重损伤系统，所有维护工作必须由约克维修技术人员按照约克的安装，操作维护手册来进行。
parsed.uncertainty_notes: The specific functions of the visible piping and vessel components cannot be determined from this image alone. The exact model within the YEWS100-YEWS200 range is not specified.
